articles.title: Bengal slashes 65 Muslim sub-groups from TMC-era list, clears twin OBC quota bills
articles.summary: West Bengal's assembly has passed two bills to revise the OBC reservation framework, now recognizing 66 communities (54 Hindu, 12 Muslim) outside SC/ST categories. This move reverses changes made by the previous TMC government, which had faced legal challenges.

articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: Gold prices tank over 1%, set for fourth consecutive monthly decline
articles.summary: Although Iranian and US negotiators were expected to meet in Doha this week, Iran said on Monday that no talks had been scheduled after fresh missile exchanges over the weekend put the interim ceasefire, which had ended the four-month conflict, under renewed strain. In the United States, the Supreme Court on Monday declined to allow President Donald Trump to dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook, reaffirming the central bank's independence in the face of an unprecedented challenge from the Republican president.

articles.title: RRB Technician Notification 2026-27 released with 6557 vacancies under CEN 02/2026; apply here
articles.summary: The Railway Recruitment Board has released the RRB Technician Notification 2026-27 under CEN 02/2026, announcing 6,557 vacancies for Technician Grade I Signal and Technician Grade III posts. The online application process begins on June 30, 2026, and ends on July 29, 2026.

articles.title: Noida schools revise Classes 1 to 8 timings as heat advisory issued in Gautam Buddh Nagar
articles.summary: The Gautam Buddh Nagar administration has revised school timings for Classes 1 to 8 in Noida and Greater Noida due to prevailing heat conditions. From June 29, 2026, schools will function from 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM until further orders.

articles.title: Class 10 student Mahima Rajput selected for Mission ShakthiSAT with participants from 108 countries
articles.summary: Fourteen-year-old Class 10 student Mahima Rajput has been selected from India for Mission ShakthiSAT, an international student space programme involving participants from 108 countries. After completing a training curriculum comprising 21 modules and 365 lessons, she will travel to Delhi for satellite integration activities beginning August 23.
